channel.title: Unimetrix 1 — The Complete Transcripts
channel.description: New sessions in the Unimetrix 1 archive — every transcript faithfully preserved from the spoken record, with light transcription and formatting cleanup. An archival record; statements are not independently verified.

item.title: June 14, 2026 — Catherine Pelizzari Ches Interrogates Unimetrix 1: Bitcoin, Epstein & the Solar Flash
item.description: June 14, 2026 — Catherine Pelizzari Ches Interrogates Unimetrix 1: Bitcoin, Epstein & the Solar Flash — a Unimetrix 1 session transcript, preserved as spoken. 2,238 words.
